ddls:
CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., Under 1, 1 to 4, 5 to 9) */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data entry */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "current_age_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current age range */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Population count for the age group */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data is recorded */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the population data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_current_age_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_age_id") REFERENCES current_ages ("current_age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "current_ages" (
  "current_age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each current age range */,
  "current_age_name" TEXT /* Name of the current age range (e.g., Under 25, 25 to 29) */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the current age (e.g., 0-24, 25-29) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("current_age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country in which the region is located */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_regions" (
  "sub_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-region */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent region */,
  "sub_region_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_by_region" (
  "population_by_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data entry by region */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "sub_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-region */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the population data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data is recorded */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_by_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_by_region_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_by_region_sub_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_region_id") REFERENCES sub_regions ("sub_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_by_region_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES population_data ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "population_by_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_population_by_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_by_region_id") REFERENCES population_by_region ("population_by_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "population_by_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the population data used in the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., regional, national) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_type FOREIGN KEY ("report_type") REFERENCES report_types ("report_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_population_by_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_by_region_id") REFERENCES population_by_region ("population_by_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type (e.g., regional, national) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "population_by_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the population data used in the visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., pie chart, bar graph) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_population_by_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_by_region_id") REFERENCES population_by_region ("population_by_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_visualization_type FOREIGN KEY ("visualization_type") REFERENCES visualization_types ("visualization_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualization_types" (
  "visualization_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization type */,
  "visualization_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization type (e.g., pie chart, bar graph) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_type_id")
)
